name: Appranking
description: Appranking — app market analytics and ASA analytics platform offering ASO intelligence, Apple Search Ads intelligence and market intelligence across Google Play and iOS App Store.

when_to_use: Apple Search Ads keyword intelligence and bid optimization analysis
Tracking ASO rankings across iOS and Google Play simultaneously
Market intelligence for identifying emerging category opportunities
Competitor keyword share analysis for search ad strategy

pros: Combines ASO and Apple Search Ads intelligence
Covers both App Store and Google Play
cons: Less recognized than Sensor Tower or AppTweak
UI rough edges on advanced reports
ASA insights narrower than dedicated ASA tools
review.verdict: Competent ASO + ASA combo platform for teams that want both without premium pricing.
review.best_for: Marketers running Apple Search Ads alongside organic ASO
review.not_for: Teams needing best-in-class creative or UA data
